caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: St. Thomas is experiencing southeast swells with wave heights reaching 5.8 ft and max winds of 16 kt, while San Juan is seeing similar conditions with 16 kt winds. I expect the highest impact in these Eastern Caribbean ports, with a 73% chance of rain in St. Thomas, as a tropical wave brings unsettled weather to the region.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing westward dominant swells with wave heights reaching 3.5 ft and wind speeds of 19 kt, along with a 78% chance of rain, while Lisbon is seeing relatively calmer conditions with max winds of 15 kt. I expect these conditions to impact marine activities in the Western Mediterranean, particularly around Cadiz, where small craft may need to exercise caution due to the moderate winds and wave heights.
